SEARCH
Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.spring.boot.starter.security.oauth2.impl

Class OAuth2IdentityProvider

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.persistence.AbstractManager
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.identity.db.DbReadOnlyIdentityServiceProvider
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.identity.db.DbIdentityServiceProvider
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.spring.boot.starter.security.oauth2.impl.OAuth2IdentityProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.identity.ReadOnlyIdentityProvider, org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.identity.WritableIdentityProvider, org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.interceptor.Session
public class OAuth2IdentityProvider extends org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.identity.db.DbIdentityServiceProvider
OAuth2 identity provider with fallback for DbIdentityServiceProvider if the Spring security context doesn't contain an authenticated user.

Since the fallback DbIdentityServiceProvider is a writeable provider this class is also writeable but with OAuth2 authentication it works effectively as a read-only provider.

    • nullOrContainsIgnoreCase

      protected static boolean nullOrContainsIgnoreCase(String searchLike, String value)
      Parameters:
      searchLike - the like value to search for
      value - the actual user attribute value
      Returns:
      true if either values are null or if value contains searchLike (case-insensitive)

    • springSecurityAuthentication

      protected boolean springSecurityAuthentication()
      Returns:
